articles.title: Bitcoin Price Moves Similarly To The Elliot Wave Count From 2017, Why Price Can Jump Another 80%
articles.description: Crypto analyst Tony Severino has drawn a similarity between the current Bitcoin price action and that of the 2017 bull run. Based on these similarities, the analyst raised the possibility of the flagship crypto witnessing an 80% surge from its current level. articles.title: ‘Praise the Lord’: Sen. Tim Scott reacts as SEC Commissioner Caroline Crenshaw’s renomination vote is scrapped
articles.description: "Praise the Lord," said Sen. Tim Scott (R-S.C.) when he heard that a vote to renominate the SEC's Caroline Crenshaw has been scrapped.

articles.title: Bitcoin Hits $108K: New Record as Confidence Grows
articles.description: Bitcoin hits a record $108K, surging 60% since the election, fueled by Trump’s pro-crypto stance, corporate adoption, and rising investor confidence.

articles.title: ‘No to CBDC, yes to Bitcoin’ — European MP calls for EU BTC reserve
articles.description: The European Parliament’s Sarah Knafo said it’s time to stop “totalitarian temptations” by the European Central Bank and adopt Bitcoin.
